response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video for structural scene changes. 2. Identified song metadata 'HAPPY MUSIC', lyrics by Fujino Manami, and music by Kataoka Mami on-screen at 03:10. 3. Searched for official lyrics using provided metadata; no official text found. 4. Transcribed and translated lyrics directly from on-screen display in the video. 5. Constructed JSON.
response.global_summary: The video features an introductory segment followed by a 3D performance of the song 'HAPPY MUSIC' by Shiranui Flare, concluding with a brief talk segment.

scenes.description: Introductory promotional art and background instrumental music.
Shiranui Flare performs her original song 'HAPPY MUSIC' in a 3D sky setting. Song details (Lyricist: Fujino Manami, Composer/Arranger: Kataoka Mami) appear on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
どうかしてる また同じシャツを
いないはずの 人混みに探してた

だれといても 何を話しても
映るすべて やたかさねている

名前しか知らない なのにね こんなに
気になるの…これって もしかして

ほら たった今 あたしのなかで
響くよ ハッピーミュージック
運命の針を胸に落として 奏でる

大事な日も まじめな時も
手加減なしの パワープレイ

誰よりも先 あなたを見つけたくて
ダーリン 今度も あのシャツきてきて
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's crazy, I was searching for you, who shouldn't be there, in a crowd, wearing the same shirt.
No matter who I'm with, no matter what I talk about, everything I see just overlaps.
I only know your name, yet, why is it so... could it be that I'm interested in you?
Look, right now, "Happy Music" is resounding inside me. I drop the needle of fate into my heart and play it.
Even on important days, even when I'm being serious, it's a power play with no holding back.
I want to find you before anyone else. Darling, wear that shirt next time too.
